ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web traffic record */,
  "reqs" INTEGER /* Number of requests made by the browser */,
  "mbytes" REAL /* Total data transferred in megabytes */,
  "pct_bytes" TEXT /* Percentage of total data transferred by the browser */,
  "pct_reqs" TEXT /* Percentage of total requests made by the browser */,
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the browser used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User responsible for the data entry or monitoring */,
  "visit_duration" REAL /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_traffic_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical traffic record */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the web traffic record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic data */,
  "reqs" INTEGER /* Number of requests made by the browser */,
  "mbytes" REAL /* Total data transferred in megabytes */,
  "pct_bytes" TEXT /* Percentage of total data transferred by the browser */,
  "pct_reqs" TEXT /* Percentage of total requests made by the browser */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User responsible for the data entry */,
  "visit_duration" REAL /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_history_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES web_traffic ("traffic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
